200.description: Get resolved agent with inherited config

post.summary: Prune a branch (POST alternative to DELETE for clients that don't support DELETE).

get.summary: Preview a governance document as PDF without requiring a saved Document record.

422.description: Document does not apply to entity type

200.description: List of governance bodies for entity

404.description: Entity or governance document not found

200.description: List of governance audit verification reports
List of governance doc bundle summaries
List of governance mode change events

422.description: Workflow not ready for packet compilation
Workflow not ready for packet compilation

403.description: Packet belongs to a different entity

400.description: Not all documents are fully signed

200.description: List of governance seats for body

422.description: Blocked by policy or missing prerequisites

404.description: Intent or approval artifact not found
Intent or document request not found

422.description: Document request belongs to a different entity
Blocked by policy or missing prerequisites

200.description: List active agents with cron channels (internal)

post.summary: Internal endpoint: resolve encrypted secrets for agent execution.
post.description:
Called by the worker to get plaintext secret values for opaque token creation.
For `"self"` proxies, decrypts from git. For external proxies, returns the URL
so the worker can forward requests there.

200.description: List of agenda items for meeting

404.description: Meeting or agenda item not found
Meeting or agenda item not found

409.description: Resolution already exists for agenda item

404.description: Meeting or agenda item not found

200.description: List of votes for agenda item

409.description: Resolution already has a document attached

name.description: Parsed at deserialization — empty names are rejected by `NonEmpty`.

AgendaItemType.description: Type of item on a meeting agenda.

AgentSkill.description: A skill that an agent can perform (used in api-rs Agent struct).

AssigneeType.description: Who is responsible for fulfilling an obligation.

AuthorityTier.description: The authority level required to approve an action.

BankAccountStatus.description: Lifecycle status of a bank account connection.

BankAccountType.description: Type of bank account held by the entity.

BodyStatus.description: Whether a governance body is active.

BranchName.description:
A validated git branch name.

Guarantees: non-empty, no `..`, no spaces, no leading `-`, no null bytes.
Implements `Deref<Target=str>` for transparent use with `&str` parameters.

BudgetConfig.description:
Execution budget limits.

All limits are validated positive on deserialization — a budget of
zero turns or zero tokens is nonsensical and rejected at parse time.

CapTableAccess.description: Level of cap table visibility granted to a contact.

ChannelConfig.description:
Inbound channel configuration — a tagged enum so that each variant
carries only the fields it needs.

The key invariant: a `Cron` channel *always* has a valid schedule.
This is unrepresentable with the old struct approach (schedule was
`Option<String>`, allowing a cron channel with no schedule).

Wire format is the same as before — internally tagged on `"type"`:
```json
{"type": "cron", "schedule": "*/5 * * * *"}
{"type": "email", "address": "bot@acme.com"}
```

ContactCategory.description: The role or relationship a contact has with the entity.

ContactStatus.description: Whether a contact record is active.

ContactType.description: Whether a contact is a person or an organization.

oneOf.description: Scope this key to a specific contact. `null` = workspace-wide.

entity_ids.description: Restrict this key to specific entities. `null` = all entities.

fiscal_year_end.description: Fiscal year end, e.g. "12-31". Defaults to "12-31".

formation_date.description: Optional formation date for importing pre-formed entities.

right_of_first_refusal.description: Include right of first refusal in bylaws (corp). Default true.

s_corp_election.description: Whether the company will elect S-Corp tax treatment.

transfer_restrictions.description: Include transfer restrictions in bylaws (corp). Default true.

oneOf.description: Deprecated: authority is always derived server-side from policy.

url.description: `"self"` for local encrypted secrets, or an external URL.

CronExpr.description:
A cron expression validated to have at least 5 whitespace-separated fields.

This is a lightweight parse — it doesn't validate each field's range,
but it rejects obviously malformed expressions at the system boundary.
The full matching logic lives in the worker's cron module.

DeadlineSeverity.description: Risk severity of missing a deadline.

DocumentRequestStatus.description: Status of a request for a document from a stakeholder.

DocumentStatus.description: Status of a document in the signing workflow.

EntityType.description: The legal structure of a business entity.

FormationState.description: High-level state of a forming entity.

FormationStatus.description: Detailed formation workflow status with valid state transitions.

GlAccountCode.description: Standard GL account codes with integer discriminants matching the code number.

GoverningDocType.description: The type of governing document for a share transfer.

HolderSummary.description: Summary of a holder created during cap table setup.

HolderType.description: Type of holder represented in the cap table.

InstrumentKind.description: Instrument kind in the ownership model.

IntentStatus.description: Lifecycle status of an execution intent.

Jurisdiction.description:
A validated jurisdiction (e.g., "Delaware", "California").

Guarantees: non-empty, at most 200 characters.

LegalEntityRole.description: Role this legal entity plays in the ownership/control graph.

MCPServerSpec.description: MCP server that runs inside the agent container.

MemberInput.description: A member/founder as provided in the formation request.

ip_description.description: Description of IP being contributed to the company.

is_incorporator.description: Whether this member is the sole incorporator (corporations only).

oneOf.description: Officer title (CEO, CFO, Secretary, etc.) — corporations only.

shares_purchased.description: Explicit number of shares being purchased at formation.

oneOf.description: Vesting schedule for the founder's shares.

MemberRole.description: Role a member holds in the entity.

NonEmpty.description:
A `String` that is guaranteed non-empty and non-whitespace-only.

This is a *parsed* type: the only way to obtain one is through
`NonEmpty::parse()` or serde deserialization, both of which reject
blank strings.  Downstream code never needs to re-check for emptiness.

ObligationStatus.description: Lifecycle status of a compliance or operational obligation.

ObligationType.description:
An extensible obligation type represented as a string.

Obligation types are not a fixed enum because they vary by jurisdiction,
entity type, and operational context.

OfficerTitle.description: Officer title for a corporate officer.

PaymentMethod.description: How a payment is made or received.

QuorumStatus.description:
Whether a quorum was met for a meeting.

Replaces `Option<bool>` for clearer semantics.
Backward-compatible deserialization from `Option<bool>` via `From`.

QuorumThreshold.description: The threshold required for a vote to pass.

keys.description: Which secret keys to resolve. If empty, resolve all.

SandboxConfig.description:
Per-agent sandbox (container) configuration.

Numeric resource limits are validated positive — a container with
zero memory or zero CPU cannot start, so we reject at parse time.

Scope.description: A single capability scope that can be granted to an API key or token.

SeatRole.description: Role of a seat in a governance body.

secrets.description: Key-value pairs. Values are plaintext — the server encrypts before storing.

Side.description: Debit or credit side of a ledger entry.

ToolSpec.description:
HTTP tool that the agent can call.

`name` and `url` are [`NonEmpty`] — deserialization of blank values
fails with a clear error rather than producing a broken tool.

TransferStatus.description: Lifecycle status of a share transfer.
